item.title: Barnwell's guide to building a Super Bowl team: Wh...
item.description: Do teams need first-round QBs to reach the Super Bowl? Is it crucial to spend big on No. 1 receivers and top-tier edge rushers? Let's sort through rosters from the past 15 Super Bowls.
item.dc:creator: Bill Barnwell

item.title: Study: NFLers die from dementia at higher rate
item.description: NFL players are four times more likely than the general population to die of neurodegenerative diseases such as dementia and Parkinson's, according to a study released Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Robert Klemko

item.title: Commanders to retire No. 44 of HOF RB Riggins
item.description: The Commanders are retiring the No. 44 worn by Hall of Famer and franchise rushing leader John Riggins -- more than 40 years after one of the most famous runs in Super Bowl history.
item.dc:creator: John Keim

item.title: Clutch Vinatieri to enter Colts' Ring of Honor
item.description: Kicker Adam Vinatieri, who will enter the Pro Football Hall of Fame next month, will enter the Colts' Ring of Honor during a ceremony Oct. 18.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Holder

item.title: Late Cowboys' player Kneeland diagnosed with CTE
item.description: Former Cowboys defensive end Marshawn Kneeland has been posthumously diagnosed with CTE.

item.title: Amid case, Arnold clears waivers, now a free agent...
item.description: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold, 23, facing legal issues in Florida after he was arrested on felony charges of armed robbery and kidnapping in Tampa, cleared waivers Monday afternoon and has become a free agent after two seasons with Detroit.

item.title: Sources: CB Douglas to sign with Commanders
item.description: Free agent CB Rasul Douglas is planning to sign a one-year deal with the Washington Commanders worth up to $3.8 million, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

item.title: Bears QB Williams gifts Pope autographed jersey
item.description: Bears quarterback Caleb Williams sent an autographed jersey to Pope Leo XIV, a Chicago native and the first American-born pope in the history of the Catholic Church.
item.dc:creator: Courtney Cronin

item.title: Chiefs' Kelce, Swift marry in ceremony at MSG
item.description: The pop superstar and Kansas City Chiefs tight end said "I do" in front of a celebrity-filled guest list at Madison Square Garden on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Tory Barron

item.title: 👀 Exclusive access with Sean Payton for 15 days
item.description: Senior writer Seth Wickersham spent two weeks with NFL football coach Sean Payton ahead of the Denver Broncos-New England Patriots AFC Championship Game.
item.dc:creator: Seth Wickersham

item.title: NFL execs, coaches and scouts rank the best defens...
item.description: Who are the best DTs in the NFL? Evaluators around the league ranked the top 10, starting with an impact interior defender from the Super Bowl champion Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Fowler

item.title: Ranking the top edge rushers: Execs, coaches and s...
item.description: Who are the best edge rushers in the NFL right now? Evaluators around the league ranked the top 10.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Fowler

item.title: Why Year 2 of Ben Johnson has a different vibe wit...
item.description: Ben Johnson established himself in Year 1, but success established expectations. What can the Bears do for an encore?
item.dc:creator: Courtney Cronin

item.title: Which NFL players could break out in 2026? Solak p...
item.description: Big year for Luther Burden III? Step forward for Calen Bullock? Opportunity for Nic Scourton to step up? And Ashton Jeanty delivering on expectations in Year 2?
item.dc:creator: Ben Solak

item.title: Which NFL teams have the best -- and worst -- rost...
item.description: Here's how every NFL roster stacks up ahead of the season, plus strengths, weaknesses, and X factors.
item.dc:creator: Mike Clay, Aaron Schatz and Seth Walder

item.title: 'Wrong Drake': Noah Kahan summons Drake Maye in 'T...
item.description: The New England Patriots quarterback was the singer's surprise guest during one of Kahan's tour stops in Boston.
item.dc:creator: Kalan Hooks

item.title: 'Hard launch': Lions WR Amon-Ra St. Brown announce...
item.description: St. Brown proposed aboard a flower-lined yacht, with the couple sharing the news on social media.
item.dc:creator: Brianna Williams

item.title: Before Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, football met Hollywood in RussField
item.description: Decades before Taylor Swift met Travis Kelce, RussField was the first power couple.
item.dc:creator: Seth Wickersham

item.title: Buzz: Why David Montgomery can be a fantasy surpri...
item.description: With a retooled offensive line and a path to a lead role, here's how David Montgomery could surprise this season.
item.dc:creator: ESPN Fantasy

item.title: Mike Evans and 11 others who will bounce back this...
item.description: Eric Karabell highlights players who disappointed in 2025, but are poised for a better 2026.
item.dc:creator: Eric Karabell
